name: Anhui Jiuhuashan Tourism Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Jiuhuashan Tourism Development Co., Ltd. provides tourism services in the People's Republic of China. It is involved in the cableway, hotel, travel agency, tourist passenger transportation, and e-commerce businesses. Anhui Jiuhuashan Tourism Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Chizhou, the People's Republic of China.
